input.Issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
input.Subject: Employee leaving the company

input.response:
To remove an employee from your HackerRank for Work account, you need to delete the team they are part of or remove them as a user. Here are the steps to delete a team:

1. Log in to your HackerRank for Work account using your credentials.
2. Select your profile icon in the upper-right corner.
3. Select Teams Management from the drop-down menu.
4. Go to the Teams tab.
5. Select the team you want to delete.
6. Click the delete icon.
7. In the confirmation dialog, click Delete Team. A success message appears.

Note: You must remove all users from the team before deleting it. For more information, see Removing a team member.

output.response: I am escalating this ticket because I could not verify a sufficiently grounded, safe automated response from the provided documentation.
